tasks.description: Validate the constructed portfolio against all mandated hard constraints.

execution_history.reason: Portfolio construction substeps complete; constraints mostly fail—insufficient diversification, low return/risk, few positions. Need additional analysis and selection from all batches, then rebuild the portfolio.

observations: Validation Results: Portfolio has 3 longs, 3 shorts only (hard constraint violation, must be 15-20 longs and 10-15 shorts). Gross exposure: 1.8x (within 150-250%). Net exposure: +0.3x (30%, within range). Portfolio beta (internal): 0.031 (meets beta hard constraint <0.4, >0, not negative). Annualized return (-11.85%), Sharpe (-0.81), and alpha (-0.14) all fail the hard constraints (required: annualized return >10%, Sharpe >1.0, alpha >1.0%). Portfolio is not diversified or alpha-generative per requirements. Must expand pool to full finalist set from all batches and repeat construction/validation process.
